data.current_description: Execute a search query and receive real-time, accurate results. Optimized for AI agents and LLMs.
data.summary_suggestion: Execute web search with real-time results
data.description_suggestion: Execute a search query against the web to retrieve real-time, accurate results optimized for AI agents and LLMs. Accepts a search query string and optional parameters for result filtering and customization (such as topic, max results, and include_images). Returns a SearchResponse containing ranked search results with titles, URLs, content snippets, and optional images. Results are sorted by relevance to the query.

message: Operation 'extract' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too minimal and lacks critical details for AI agent usage. Enhanced description specifies: (1) input structure (ExtractRequest with URL list), (2) output structure (ExtractResponse with content and metadata), (3) error handling (failed extractions reported separately), and (4) use cases (articles, documentation, page content). This enables AI agents to understand when extraction is appropriate and how to handle responses.

data.current_description: Extract raw content from one or more URLs.
data.description_suggestion: Extract and parse raw content from one or more URLs. Accepts an ExtractRequest containing a list of URLs to process. Returns an ExtractResponse with extracted content for each URL, including the raw text and metadata. Failed extractions are reported separately with error details. Useful for retrieving full article text, documentation, or page content for AI processing.
